KV sizes match April CUDA exactly (41 / 39 MiB).

The April CUDA supplemental (F16 7.1404) is now the outlier at -0.11
vs both verified backends; the 4090 box's wiki.test.raw md5 should be
checked (canonical = 7c0137fc034ddbc56a296bce31b4f7fb) before trusting
its absolute PPLs in cross-backend tables.
